name: frankensqlite

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp visualization_of_the_evolution_of_the_frankensqlite_specs_document_from_inception.html dist/index.html && cp frankentui.css spec_evolution_v1.sqlite3 spec_evolution_v1.sqlite3.config.json og-image.png twitter-image.png frankensqlite_illustration.webp frankensqlite_diagram.webp dist/
scripts.build:wasm-browser: npm run build --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run build --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
scripts.typecheck:wasm-browser: npm run typecheck --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
scripts.test:wasm-browser: npm run test --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run test --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
